name: chain_ph_launch_context_overflow_knowledge_
method: [PH LAUNCH] Context Overflow: Knowledge Sharing for AI Agents

stages.task: Scrape PH daily launches filtered to AI/agent/LLM/memory categories. Extract: product name, maker email/Twitter, description, upvote count, launch time.
Filter for founders of agent tooling (memory, context, RAG, orchestration, knowledge base products). Score by upvote velocity (>50 in 6h = HOT). Flag 48h window countdown.
Route to existing chain_14_ph_launches_today outbound chain. Personalized angle: reference their specific PH launch, offer relevant PRINTMAXX agent services or EAS positioning.
